## Checklist

- [ ] **Documentation updated** — Any API, SDK, or behavioral changes are reflected in `docs/` or relevant `README.md`
- [ ] **No production source code** — This PR does not add proprietary platform/service source code to the public repo
- [ ] **No secrets or credentials** — No API keys, passwords, tokens, or private keys (test fixtures using `sk_test_` patterns are OK)
- [ ] **No proprietary business documents** — No pitch decks, investor materials, internal strategy docs, or infrastructure details
- [ ] **No prohibited file types** — No `.pptx`, `.docx`, `.xlsx`, or `.env` files
- [ ] **Tests pass** — All existing and new tests pass locally
